title: security-review step result
description: Sidecar schema for the security-review workflow step.

ticket.description: JIRA ticket ID as provided by the user (preserves original case)

scanner_findings.description: Total findings from the deterministic PII scanner. Consumed by orchestrator for iteration logic.

critical_findings.description: Critical-severity findings (credentials, private keys). Consumed by orchestrator for iteration logic.

agent_findings.description: Findings from the Layer 2 agent analysis checklist

context_size_bytes.description: Total bytes of step output files. Consumed by orchestrator for size logging.
